testcase.name: test_register_returns_jwt_and_webhook_once
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:31: in test_register_returns_jwt_and_webhook_once assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"TEST_user_6b7018eb@sentinel.local","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_email_409

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 422 == 200 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code + where <Response [422]> = post('http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/register', json={'email': 'TEST_user_9ab202b4@sentinel.local', 'password': 'Passw0rd!'}) + where post = <requests.sessions.Session object at 0xf910d6cb9890>.post

testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:41: in test_register_duplicate_email_409 assert session.post(f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/auth/register", json=body).status_code == 200 E AssertionError: assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code E + where <Response [422]> = post('http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/register', json={'email': 'TEST_user_9ab202b4@sentinel.local', 'password': 'Passw0rd!'}) E + where post = <requests.sessions.Session object at 0xf910d6cb9890>.post

testcase.name: test_login_success_and_wrong_password
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:50: in test_login_success_and_wrong_password assert ok.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_me_requires_bearer
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:64: in test_me_requires_bearer headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {reg['access_token']}"}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_simulation_visible_only_to_owner
testcase.error: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:98: in user_a return {"email": email, "token": r["access_token"], "webhook": r["webhook_token"], "id": r["user"]["id"]} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_webhook_scoping_and_bad_token
testcase.error: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:98: in user_a return {"email": email, "token": r["access_token"], "webhook": r["webhook_token"], "id": r["user"]["id"]} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_same_service_alertname_different_severity_creates_two
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:175: in test_same_service_alertname_different_severity_creates_two tok = reg["webhook_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'webhook_token'

testcase.name: test_rotate_invalidates_old_token
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:205: in test_rotate_invalidates_old_token old = reg["webhook_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'webhook_token'

testcase.name: test_register_rate_limit_triggers_429
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_backend.py:235: in test_register_rate_limit_triggers_429 assert 429 in statuses, f"Expected 429 in {statuses}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 in [422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422] E assert 429 in [422, 422, 422, 422, 422, 422, ...]
